name: FizzBuzz output
description: Ask the model to produce FizzBuzz output for numbers 1-15
prompt: Write the FizzBuzz output for numbers 1 through 15, one per line. Rules: multiples of 3 print 'Fizz', multiples of 5 print 'Buzz', multiples of both print 'FizzBuzz', otherwise print the number. Return only the output, nothing else.
